title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: HOMES FOR GOOD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental assistance to low-income families in the private rental market. A family member must complete a housing application and be placed on a waitlist. When the family reaches the top of the waitlist, income and assets are verified and the family may be considered eligible. The eligible family then locates a unit and a willing owner and enters into a lease agreement; the owner contracts with Homes for Good. Homes for Good pays the owner a portion of the family's rent based on their income. New families are added to the program as vacancies occur. Also fields complaints about Section 8 housing. 100 W 13th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Low-income families, pregnant women, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Eligibility is based on income, criminal history, and citizenship status at the time a household reaches the top of the waitlist. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3755 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3755 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - PUBLIC HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOMES FOR GOOD
